閪熊新手問題整合(By:一組嘅楠木巴)
For懶得睇教學片同常見問題嘅6仔朋友們，以後唔會再答呢度有嘅問題
A)開工篇
1.開工前打卡
打卡地圖更開始前30分鐘先睇到，會有藍圈顯示咩範圍先打到卡。
2.接單
當好彩系統俾單你嘅時候記住1分鐘內接受，唔係就自動當你拒絕+放你半個鐘break。
3.攞野食
攞完禁已取餐。唔好攞漏野/錯單，
唔係嘅話另一個熊貓手足真係多得你唔少。
4.去客到
app個pin有時會錯，自己對google map穩陣d。
5.完單
建議落返街信號好個時先禁已送達，費時搭lift個時俾系統派單接唔到被逼放break。
6.分單
有時太多野攞唔到可以問耳筒分單搵多個熊貓幫手攞。
7.轉單
步兵多過1km/自己有其他原因可以叫耳筒轉走張單，佢理唔理你另一回事。

B)錢銀篇
1.出糧
每張單固定人工，區區唔同。糧每兩個禮拜三出一次，同埋第一次出糧會扣義工裝備費。
2.COD
有時攞完野食會提你問客收返錢(COD)，記住要收。app錢包個度唔係你人工，係COD條數，每個禮拜一會email叫你還錢。過數/轉數快備註自己id cap低tg返俾閪熊之後一兩日cherry會幫你扣返。
3.20蚊地獄
接單率太低(拒絕太多)會變每張單得30(車手)/20(步兵)蚊。

C)系統篇
1.冇單
閪熊系統可以係你與某人同一更同一位置等單
人地送左幾轉你都可能冇單
罰企情況追post都見到好多 (By 我咩都唔識架)
2.攞更
6仔星期一夜晚9點自己去rooster攞下星期更
3.自己id
Roadrunner>Rooster>My Profile
4.做埋其他區
(雖然而家好似可以攞曬全部區嘅更)
http://bit.ly/AdditionalAreasSpecialShifts
5.仲有問題?
Roadrunner>幫助>常見問題

This a message for cyclists and couriers who need shift adjustment during Ramadan:

1. Cyclists
To further fulfil our operational needs, starting from next week, we only arrange cyclists in the following zones: Aberdeen, Admiralty CWB, Kennedy Town, Lai Chi Kok, Ma On Shan, Sai Kung, Tai Po, Tin Shui Wai, To Kwa Wan, Tseung Kwan O, Tsing Yi and Yuen Long. If you are with a cyclist contract or agreement but hope to deliver in these zones, you will need to request to change to a walker contract or agreement by visiting our TST office during opening hours or create a ticket via Rider Support within Roadrunner. Kindly note that the system only allows either one of the vehicle types - you can choose to either be a walker or a cyclist, but not both.

2. Couriers who need special arrangement during Ramadan
We respect your religious practices and therefore we have few updates for you if you need special arrangement during Ramadan:
- for couriers with fixed shifts: we will send you an email and you will need to reply to that email for any shift adjustment requests. Please refer to that email for complete details.
- for employed couriers with open shifts: since the break request function is only available to freelancers and any breaks/lateness/early clock-out will affect your Planned VS Actual Hours Scoring, you are strongly encouraged to take open shifts ONLY if you are sure that you can attend your shifts.
- for self-employed couriers: as long as you do not hit “accepted” when you are assigned with a new order, you can make use of the break request function on Roadrunner anytime you want.

Stay healthy, thank you.

This a message for cyclists and couriers who need shift adjustment during Ramadan:

1. Cyclists
To further fulfil our operational needs, starting from next week, we only arrange cyclists in the following zones: Aberdeen, Admiralty CWB, Kennedy Town, Lai Chi Kok, Ma On Shan, Sai Kung, Tai Po, Tin Shui Wai, To Kwa Wan, Tseung Kwan O, Tsing Yi and Yuen Long. If you are with a cyclist contract or agreement but hope to deliver in these zones, you will need to request to change to a walker contract or agreement by visiting our TST office during opening hours or create a ticket via Rider Support within Roadrunner. Kindly note that the system only allows either one of the vehicle types - you can choose to either be a walker or a cyclist, but not both.

2. Couriers who need special arrangement during Ramadan
We respect your religious practices and therefore we have few updates for you if you need special arrangement during Ramadan:
- for couriers with fixed shifts: we will send you an email and you will need to reply to that email for any shift adjustment requests. Please refer to that email for complete details.
- for employed couriers with open shifts: since the break request function is only available to freelancers and any breaks/lateness/early clock-out will affect your Planned VS Actual Hours Scoring, you are strongly encouraged to take open shifts ONLY if you are sure that you can attend your shifts.
- for self-employed couriers: as long as you do not hit “accepted” when you are assigned with a new order, you can make use of the break request function on Roadrunner anytime you want.

Stay healthy, thank you.
